DP.063.0000:
Giving nicknames to Pokémon is
the way to go.\f
It makes you feel as if they’re your
very own.
DP.063.0001:
But he named our PSYDUCK “Yellow”
just because of its color...\f
I don’t understand the logic behind
that at all.
DP.063.0002:
Are you catching Pokémon?
Here, take this if you’d like.\f
DP.063.0003:
The Dusk Ball is a Poké Ball designed
for use in darkness.\f
It works better if you use it at
night or in a cave.
